---
title: "NTTS 2027: call for abstracts until October 15h!"
author: "Anna Smyk"
date: "2026-07-01"
categories: [Talks on JD+]
image: "Ntts_2027_Logo_Dates.png"
---

Get ready for NTTS 2027 ! You have until October 15th to submit an abstract and be on the program of this unique event in Official Statistics ! 

All details [on the NTTS webpage](https://cros.ec.europa.eu/NTTS2027) 

I will have the pleasure to chair a session on **Time Series analysis**, more on that later..

Looking forward to meeting you in Brussels !
